use_cases: Multi-step onboarding or registration flows showing completion progress
Checkout or payment process step tracking
Tutorial or guided setup wizard progress indicators
Survey or questionnaire multi-page form progress
Course lesson or module completion tracking
ai_summary: A three-step progress indicator component with animated green bar overlay showing completion status through dots. Features spring-based framer-motion animations for smooth progress transitions and Continue/Back button controls for navigating through multi-step workflows. Designed for universal use across onboarding, checkout, and wizard-style interfaces.
